description_long: This object is a flag mounted on a tall, slender pole. The flag itself features two horizontal bands: the upper band is blue and the lower band is yellow, representing the national flag of Ukraine. At the top of the pole, there is a trident finial, which is a national symbol of Ukraine. The flag is rectangular and appears to be made of fabric, while the pole is likely metallic, giving it a sturdy and upright appearance. The flag is attached to the pole along one vertical edge, allowing it to hang freely. The overall design is clean and the materials appear to be in excellent condition.
description: A Ukrainian flag with blue and yellow horizontal bands, mounted on a tall metal pole with a trident finial.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full flag with blue over yellow bands and the trident finial clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the pole and the flag edge, with minimal flag detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the flag's colors and trident finial from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin pole and flag edge with little flag detail visible.
attribute_flag_design: The flag features two equal horizontal bands of blue (top) and yellow (bottom), with no additional patterns or text. A trident finial, the Tryzub, is present atop the pole, symbolizing Ukraine.
